news.headline: Global Blue Group has announced the repricing of its term loan and revolving credit facility after strong H1 FY2024/25 results. Net leverage reduced from 3.4x to 2.9x. Active de-leveraging continues towards a long-term target of less than 2.5x.
news.summary: In SIGNY, Switzerland, Global Blue Group Holding AG has reported impressive financial performance in the first half of fiscal year 2024/25. The company saw double-digit growth in both revenue and profitability, coupled with robust cash flow generation. During this period, net leverage decreased from 3.4x in June 2024 to 2.9x by September 2024, as the company aims to further reduce it to less than 2.5x in the long term. Given this strong showing, the company initiated a repricing strategy.

news.headline: CoinEx held 11 consecutive Brand Day events in 2024, showcasing its branding strategies and tech innovations amid global crypto competition.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 9, 2024, CoinEx, a prominent player in the global crypto industry, has solidified its position as a market leader with innovative branding tactics and technological advancements. Throughout 2024, CoinEx organized 11 successive Brand Day events, showcasing its continued success amidst the competitive crypto landscape.

news.headline: Citi: It's time to bet against rapid ECB rate cuts.
CareTrust REIT buys Midwest portfolio for $97 million, totaling 46 facilities with 3,820 beds/units; also closes phase 1 of TN acquisition.
news.summary: A California-based company, CareTrust REIT, Inc. (NYSE:CTRE), recently disclosed its acquisition of a sizable portfolio in the Midwest. The portfolio consists of 46 facilities, totaling 3,820 beds/units dedicated to skilled nursing and seniors housing. The investment required for this acquisition was around $97 million, covering all transaction costs. Out of the acquired facilities, seven operate as skilled nursing and assisted living campuses, with an additional seven designated as assisted living facilities. This strategic move also involved the company entering into undisclosed agreements in connection with the acquisition.

news.headline: Essity bought back 270,000 Class B shares in week 49, 2024. Dec. 9 news article.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, it was reported that Essity Aktiebolag (publ) had repurchased 270,000 of its own Class B shares (ISIN: SE0009922164) between December 2, 2024, and December 6, 2024. The buyback was conducted in line with the buyback program approved by the Board of Directors.

news.headline: Jeffs’ Brands secures global exclusive to distribute advanced drone safety systems on Amazon for two years.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on December 9, 2024, Jeffs' Brands Ltd, trading under Nasdaq symbols JFBR and JFBRW, disclosed that they secured an exclusive global distribution deal for cutting-edge drone safety systems from a top drone manufacturer. The agreement spans a two-year term and involves specific terms and conditions. Jeffs' Brands will market these state-of-the-art drone safety systems solely through Amazon's international platform.

news.headline: Global Mirror Coatings Market to hit US$ 428M by 2034, growing at 6% CAGR, driven by solar energy, automotive, and construction sectors. East Asia to hold 27.2% market share while epoxy mirror coatings to grow at 5.8% CAGR creating US$ 91.8M opportunity. North America & East Asia to generate US$ 103M opportunity. Innovations like self-cleaning coatings to fuel market growth.
news.summary: The global Mirror Coatings Market is projected to reach a valuation of US$ 239.0 million by 2024, with a further expected expansion at a CAGR of 6% to reach US$ 428.0 billion by 2034. The increasing demand for mirror coatings is primarily driven by global solar energy projects, influencing the efficiency and durability of solar panels. Additionally, mirror coatings are crucial in automotive and construction industries, enhancing vehicle safety, architectural aesthetics, and energy efficiency in buildings.The market is also advancing due to innovations in anti-reflective coatings, catering to the need for low reflectivity of light in various sectors. This leads to higher utilization and return on investment for manufacturers, especially in high-quality mirrors for autos, scientific equipment, and solar energy.Key takeaways from the market study include the creation of a US$ 46.5 million opportunity with a 5.8% CAGR between 2019 and 2023. East Asia is expected to hold a market share of 27.2% in 2034, with epoxy mirror coatings under the Resin type projected to grow at a CAGR of 5.8%, creating an absolute $ opportunity of US$ 91.8 million between 2024 and 2034. North America and East Asia are forecasted to collectively create an absolute $ opportunity of US$ 103 million.Innovations like self-cleaning mirror coatings and advanced properties such as hydrophobic and photocatalytic are expected to drive the mirror coatings market further.

news.headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. to acquire AssuredPartners pending regulatory approval, expected to close Q1 2025.
news.summary: In Rolling Meadows, Illinois, on December 9, 2024, Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. disclosed its plan to buy AssuredPartners by signing a definitive agreement. The completion of this acquisition is contingent upon receiving standard regulatory approvals and is projected to finalize in the initial quarter of 2025. "We are pleased to announce the agreement..."

news.headline: Dow partners with Macquarie to launch Diamond Infrastructure Solutions; Macquarie acquires 40% stake in Dow assets for $2.4B.
news.summary: A private equity fund overseen by Macquarie Asset Management is set to purchase a starting 40% interest in specific infrastructure assets located along the U.S. Gulf Coast currently owned by Dow. The agreement allows for the fund to potentially raise its ownership to 49% within six months following the deal closure. Dow is anticipated to gain around $2.4 billion in initial cash earnings from this transaction.

news.headline: IDEAYA Biosciences develops IDE892, a potential best-in-class MTA-cooperative PRMT5 inhibitor with robust antitumor activity.IND filing soon.
news.summary: IDE892 is a powerful and specific MTA-cooperative PRMT5 inhibitor that possesses favorable ADME properties. It shows strong pathway suppression specific to MTAP deletion, along with long-lasting antitumor effects when combined with IDE397. Additionally, studies for IDE397's IND-enabling are currently in progress, with a focus on targeting IND-filing.

news.headline: Vincent Aurentz joins Forward Therapeutics board of directors in Palm Beach Gardens on Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: A new announcement from Forward Therapeutics, Inc., a leading biopharmaceutical company based in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, stated that Vincent Aurentz has been named to their board of directors on December 9, 2024. The company is focused on revolutionizing the management of chronic inflammatory conditions.

news.headline: Halfpricesoft.com launches ezW2 2024 with W2 Checklist for simplified tax filing. Guide for small businesses in 2025.
news.summary: In Houston on December 9, 2024, Halfpricesoft.com, a prominent provider of innovative tax software solutions, revealed their new W2 Checklist intended to assist small businesses during the upcoming tax season in 2025. This comprehensive tool aims to streamline the tax process and reduce stress for businesses.

news.headline: Noah presents global growth and investment leadership at Corporate Open Day, focusing on expansion and client value.
news.summary: Expanding into growing markets worldwide with new brands, bolstered by strategic investment plans and increased product range, for the benefit of clients. Enhancing services to cater to changing demands, on a global scale. Recently in Shanghai on December 9, 2024, these developments were highlighted.

news.headline: Arelion to develop new PoP at Aruba's Rome data center; partnership aims to help multinational enterprises.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, two major companies, Aruba S.p.A. based in Italy and Arelion, coming from Sweden, have initiated a partnership to address connectivity challenges for multinational enterprises. Aruba S.p.A. is known for its services in cloud computing, data centers, hosting, e-mail systems, domain registration, and PEC services, while Arelion specializes in providing solutions for connectivity issues faced by large international corporations. This partnership is significant as it combines the expertise of both companies to cater to the connectivity needs of businesses across various industries and geographies. The collaboration aims to leverage Aruba's dominance in Italy and Arelion's global connectivity solutions to create a stronger presence in the market. This strategic alliance is expected to drive growth and innovation in the sector, benefiting a wide range of businesses.

news.headline: QinetiQ US expands to Huntsville, AL, strengthening commitment to defense and aerospace sectors with mission-led innovation.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, on December 9, 2024, QinetiQ US, a prominent defense and national security firm, disclosed its venture into Huntsville, Alabama, as part of efforts to enhance its provision of innovative solutions to crucial defense and aerospace industries. This decision signifies a significant step in expanding its operational footprint, showcasing dedication towards advancing capabilities in the field.

news.headline: Graphene market to reach $2.94 billion by 2029, with reports from MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report was released detailing the Graphene Market. The report categorizes graphene into two types: Bulk Graphene and Monolayer Graphene. It discusses various sources, applications, end-use industries such as Automotive & Transportation, Aerospace & Defense, Electronics, and Construction, and regions. The report provides a global forecast for the market up to 2029. The market size and growth projections are included in the report.

news.headline: H.I.G. Capital invests in Central London living sector project; $66 billion capital under management.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, a major global alternative investment firm, H.I.G. Capital, shared that one of its affiliates has made a significant investment in an off-market deal to secure a valuable land plot in a strategic location. H.I.G. Capital manages an impressive $66 billion in capital across its various investments.

news.headline: World Aquatics and Sony partner for cutting-edge technology to enhance aquatic sports; 4-year deal until 2028.
news.summary: An Official Partnership has been established between World Aquatics and Sony Corporation, set to last until 2028. The agreement, announced in LAUSANNE, Switzerland and TOKYO on December 9, 2024, aims to provide captivating sports experiences for aquatic enthusiasts globally. This collaboration is expected to bring exciting events and content to fans over the next four years.

news.headline: Record $3.85B inflows in Crypto ETPs as Bitcoin crosses $100K milestone; Ether reaches $4,000 again.
news.summary: Last week, the cryptocurrency market achieved remarkable milestones as Bitcoin surpassed $100,000 for the first time and Ether reached $4,000. These record-breaking highs reflect the significant growth and investor interest in the digital asset space.

news.headline: CLEAR opens new enrollment and renewal location at Westfield World Trade Center, offering convenient option for TSA PreCheck enrollment.
news.summary: A new enrollment center has opened, providing a convenient option for consumers to enroll or renew their TSA PreCheck membership. The location aims to streamline the process for individuals looking to access expedited security screenings at airports. This new facility offers services for enrolling or renewing TSA PreCheck memberships, potentially reducing wait times and increasing accessibility for travelers. This initiative is in response to the increasing demand for TSA PreCheck, with a current membership of over 10 million individuals. The new enrollment location is anticipated to cater to a significant number of applicants seeking to join or extend their membership in the program.

news.headline: Mullen Group Ltd. aims for 10% growth in 2025 as per the approved plan by the Board of Directors.
news.summary: In Okotoks, Alberta, on December 9, 2024, Mullen Group Ltd. (TSX: MTL) revealed that its 2025 plan has received approval from the Board of Directors. Known as "We," "Our," and/or the "Corporation," Mullen Group is ready to move forward with this strategic initiative.

news.headline: Experian introduces 'No Ding Decline' to allow consumers to apply for credit cards without harming their FICO® Score if rejected.
news.summary: In Costa Mesa, California, Experian introduces a new benefit called No Ding Decline, allowing consumers to apply for credit cards without impacting their FICO® Score in case of rejection. This offer provides a valuable opportunity for individuals to seek credit card approval without fear of negative consequences on their credit score.

Company Tryg has initiated share buyback program for €150 million, aiming to repurchase up to 7 million shares.
HKMA issues warning about fake website connected to ICBC (Asia), urging vigilance among public.
news.summary: The public is being warned by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority regarding a fake website and internet banking login screen tied to Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (Asia) Limited. The fraudulent platform is attempting to deceive individuals into disclosing their personal banking details. It is crucial for individuals to stay vigilant and avoid accessing this website to prevent falling victim to financial scams. Report any suspicious activity to the authorities immediately. Stay informed and protect your sensitive information.

news.headline: Sarmento of Portugal expresses confidence that France will resolve crisis.
China alters monetary stance after 14 years to tackle economic slowdown; Central bank implements "extraordinary" actions.
news.summary: In response to a weakening economy and declining prices, the Politburo of China has directed the country's central bank to adopt a more flexible policy approach and implement "extraordinary" measures.

news.headline: XRP price drops due to profit-taking and overheated conditions, leading to potential short-term correction.
news.summary: The price of XRP has decreased today due to profit-taking and concerns about overheated market conditions. This could potentially result in a more significant correction in the short term.

news.headline: Creality earns recognition with K1 Series, HALOT-MAGE Pro, and Falcon2 40W as IDEA 2024 finalists.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on December 9, 2024, Creality's K1 Series 3D printers, HALOT-MAGE Pro 3D printer, and Falcon2 40W laser engraver have been announced as Finalists in the renowned International Design Excellence Awards (IDEA) 2024. These innovative products have garnered widespread recognition, showcasing Creality's commitment to excellence in design.

news.headline: Beware: HKMA cautions of fake online banking sites connected to Shanghai Commercial Bank. Report any concerns promptly.
news.summary: Hong Kong's financial regulatory body, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority, has issued a warning to the public regarding deceptive online platforms and banking portals pretending to be affiliated with Shanghai Commercial Bank Limited. Citizens are advised to exercise vigilance and report any questionable transactions promptly.

news.headline: HKMA cautions public about fake China Construction Bank website, stay alert as scams rise. #fraud #phishing
news.summary: HKMA has issued a warning regarding a fake website imitating China Construction Bank (Asia), advising the public to be cautious of fraudulent activities. The public is urged to stay vigilant against scams and phishing attempts to safeguard their financial information. It is crucial to be cautious when sharing personal details online.

news.headline: UK Government: Major UK pork producers can resume exports to China.
Sarmento: France turmoil won't spill over.
International Petroleum Corp buys back 115,804 shares through its Normal Course Issuer Bid program.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 9, 2024, International Petroleum Corporation (IPC) disclosed the repurchase of 115,804 of its common shares (ISIN: CA46016U1084) between December 5-6, 2024. The shares were bought under IPC’s normal course issuer bid/share repurchase program (NCIB). IPC, traded on TSX and Nasdaq Stockholm under the symbol IPCO, expressed satisfaction with this transaction.

news.headline: Axiata and Sinar Mas are reportedly close to a deal for Indonesian units, sources say. #BusinessNews #Indonesia
Bitcoin hovers near $94,000. Expect potential volatility this week as market faces inefficiency on short timeframes.
news.summary: Bitcoin is experiencing significant inefficiency on short timeframes as it enters a week that is anticipated to be volatile.

news.headline: Hisense becomes top player in global premium TV market with 100-inch TV in Q3 2024.
news.summary: In Q3 of 2024, Hisense, a prominent brand in the consumer electronics and home appliances sector based in Qingdao, China, established itself as the leading competitor in the premium TV market worldwide. The company achieved this milestone with the release of its 100-inch TV. This success was confirmed by a renowned international market research firm.

news.headline: BingX hosts event in Seoul with Chelsea legends to empower football enthusiasts; global crypto exchange partners with Chelsea.
news.summary: In Vilnius, Lithuania on December 9, 2024, BingX, a prominent global cryptocurrency exchange, successfully wrapped up a charitable event in Seoul, South Korea. Serving as the official crypto exchange partner of Chelsea Football Club, BingX organized a heartwarming initiative that brought together youth in the realm of football.

news.headline: Fraikin and Samsara expand collaboration across Europe, enhancing logistics efficiency and performance.
news.summary: The partnership between Fraikin and Samsara is expanding across Europe following its success. This collaboration between the two companies, based in London and Paris, aims to enhance their services in the region. Fraikin and Samsara are joining forces to bring their expertise to a wider market, with significant growth expected. The collaboration will cover multiple countries, with a focus on providing innovative solutions to customers in the transportation industry. This expansion is set to increase their reach and impact, showcasing the companies' commitment to delivering top-notch services to a larger clientele in Europe.

news.headline: BP and Jera plan to invest around $5.8 billion in a new offshore wind joint venture.
Portugal's Sarmento reassures no spillover from France turmoil.
Cicada Resort Bali Ubud, Autograph Collection offers romantic getaway in Sebatu's natural sanctuary, near famous attractions.
news.summary: In Bali, Indonesia, on December 9, 2024, the Cicada Resort Bali Ubud, Autograph Collection, nestled in Sebatu's tranquil natural setting, signifies a significant milestone in the Autograph Collection's growth in Indonesia. The resort is conveniently situated just a 10-minute drive from the picturesque Tegallalang Rice Fields and 25 minutes away from the scenic Kintamani region. This new property offers guests access to a serene sanctuary surrounded by lush greenery, further enhancing the Autograph Collection's presence in the region.

news.headline: Sir Rod Stewart showcases his HO scale model railway layout, featured in Britain's top model railway magazine.
news.summary: In Beer, England, on December 9, 2024, Railway Modeller, the top model railway magazine in Britain, unveiled an exclusive interview with iconic British rock star Sir Rod Stewart. The interview features his impressive HO scale model railway setup, known as the "Grand Street & Three Rivers."

news.headline: Iran plans to regulate crypto to nullify sanctions before Trump's return. Minister Hemmati announced a new framework to organize digital currencies. Iranian investors hold $30-50 billion in crypto assets.
news.summary: Iran is shifting its approach towards cryptocurrency by opting for regulation over restriction, aligning with President-elect Donald Trump's favorable stance on crypto. Iranian Minister of Economic Affairs and Finance, Abdolnaser Hemmati, revealed the regulatory plan during a national event, emphasizing the goal to minimize adverse effects and maximize positive impacts of digital currencies. The Central Bank of Iran has released guidelines emphasizing tax compliance and anti-money laundering efforts. Iranian investors presently own around $30-50 billion in cryptocurrency assets, which is close to ...

news.headline: Taylor Swift's Eras Tour sets record with $2B total over 21 months, doubling closest competitor's gross in ticket sales.
news.summary: In a span of 21 months, the iconic pop star's highly influential stage performance amassed double the revenue of its nearest rival, as per recently verified ticket sale data.

news.headline: Adastra is a launch partner for Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio, aiming to streamline data analytics and ML workflows.
news.summary: In Toronto, a prominent global data and analytics firm, Adastra, has revealed its partnership as a launch collaborator for Amazon SageMaker Unified Studio. This innovative platform aims to enhance data analytics and machine learning processes. This partnership represents a pivotal moment in Adastra's commitment to equipping businesses with advanced data tools, simplifying intricate procedures, and encouraging innovation. It emphasizes the company's dedication to empowering industries with state-of-the-art solutions.

news.headline: Immutable introduces 'Perpetual Rewards' with RavenQuest leading. Gems unlock rewards from Jan 2025. RavenQuest's Phase 3 land sale sold out within hours on Immutable.
news.summary: Starting in January 2025, Gems will begin to unlock rewards in the evolving world of RavenQuest, a prominent web3 MMORPG based in Sydney. The game recently marked a significant achievement with its Phase 3 land sale selling out rapidly on Immutable platform. The sale concluded within hours of its launch, showcasing the strong demand for virtual land in the game. This development hints at a promising future for RavenQuest, where players can look forward to exciting opportunities with their Gems.

news.headline: Edible oils market valued at $250.78 billion in 2024; projected to reach $306.92 billion by 2029, with 4.1% CAGR.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the edible oils market is worth an estimated USD 250.78 billion in 2024. The market is anticipated to grow to USD 306.92 billion by 2029, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.1% during the forecast period. news.headline: Bitcoin hit $99,500 after Trump's win in Nov 2024. CoinEx Research report mentions Trump's pro-crypto policies.
news.summary: In December 2024, Hong Kong witnessed a significant milestone in cryptocurrency as Bitcoin experienced a remarkable surge, reaching $99,500 after the victory of Donald Trump in the U.S. presidential election. According to CoinEx Research, Trump's supportive stance on crypto, growing institutional trust, and technological progress were key factors contributing to this surge.

news.headline: Guild Garage Group partners with Action Garage Door, forming strategic alliance for residential garage services.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Guild Garage Group, a coalition of residential garage door service firms specializing in replacement, repair, and installation, disclosed the finalized strategic alliance with Action Garage Door. Action Garage Door is a prominent company in the industry and this partnership marks a significant move for Guild Garage Group. The collaboration is set to enhance the services offered by both entities, providing increased efficiency and coverage in the market.
